segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: Yeah, I think that's a really interesting thing, but I also think that first we should annotate the thing that we're recording now.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: And then, yeah, just to get the eVal done and stuff, perhaps get as many benchmarks as possible for those that we can and then we can look at that.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: But I think it would be good for, since everyone's annotating their own recording, try to be as fast as possible, since everyone else depends on
